Vulnerable.effect: Receive 50% more damage from Attacks for X turns
Vulnerable.notes: Odd Mushroom reduces to +25%. Paper Frog increases to +75%. Applied after Strength and Vigor, then final damage rounds down.

Weak.effect: Attacks deal 25% less damage for X turns
Weak.notes: Paper Crane reduces to 40% less (i.e. 60% damage). Negated by Ginger.

Frail.effect: Gain 25% less Block from cards for X turns

Poison.effect: At the start of its turn, lose X HP, then reduce Poison by 1
Poison.notes: Catalyst multiplies poison. Snecko Skull adds 1 poison. Only 9999 can be applied in single instance.

Strength_Down.effect: At the end of this turn, lose X Strength

Strength_Negative.notes: From Disarm, Piercing Wail, Malaise, Dark Shackles.

Dexterity_Negative.effect: Decreases Block gained from cards by X

Artifact.notes: Does not interact with existing debuffs.

Lock-On.effect: Lightning and Dark Orbs deal 50% more damage to this enemy

Dexterity.effect: Increases Block gained from cards by X
Dexterity.notes: Flat bonus to block from block cards.

Block_Next_Turn.effect: At the start of your next turn, gain X Block

Draw_Cards_Next_Turn.effect: At the start of your next turn, draw X additional cards

Energy_Next_Turn.effect: Gain X additional energy next turn

Intangible.effect: Reduce all damage taken and HP loss to 1. Lasts for X turns

Plating.effect: At the end of your turn, gain X Block. Plating is reduced by 1 at the start of your turn

Retain_Hand.effect: Retain your Hand for the next X turns
Retain_Hand.notes: Cards stay in hand instead of discarding.

Thorns.effect: When hit by an attack, deal X damage back

Vigor.effect: Your next Attack deals X additional damage
Vigor.notes: One-time damage bonus per stack, consumed on attack.

Buffer.effect: Prevent the next X times you would lose HP
Buffer.notes: Negates HP loss instances (e.g. Intangible-like for one hit).

Sly.effect: When this card is discarded from your hand, it plays itself once
Sly.notes: STS2 keyword. Often granted by Con Artist etc. Prioritize discard effects when you have Sly cards.

Exhaust.effect: Removes a card from play for the rest of combat and places it in the Exhaust pile
Exhaust.notes: Most cards Exhaust themselves on use; some cards can Exhaust others. Exhume (Ironclad) can bring back one Exhausted card.

Ethereal.effect: Automatically Exhausted if in hand at the end of your turn
Ethereal.notes: Must be played or discarded before turn end to avoid Exhaust.

Innate.effect: Appears in the first hand of cards drawn during combat
Innate.notes: Takes up one of the default draw slots. If Innate cards exceed first-hand draw count, all Innate cards still appear (effective free draw).

keywords.Exhaust: Removes a card from your deck for the rest of the current combat
keywords.Draw: Put cards from Draw Pile into Hand
keywords.Retain: Card stays in Hand at end of turn
